title: 7 Accessing Business Taxes in PaymentStream Direct
body_text:
7	Accessing Business Taxes in PaymentStream Direct
7.1	Overview of Accessing Business Taxes
PaymentStream
â¢
Direct offers two environments for Business Taxes, one for testing and one for production. To access these environments, you must be set up as a CPS Admin Security Officer or as a Client Centre User with access to Business Taxes. See Chapter 5, Business Taxes User Management, for more information.
This chapter describes the login procedures for each environment. For procedures on completing tax forms, see Section 8.2, Submitting Files and Tax Payments to CRA via Business Taxes.
7.2	Logging in to the Test Environment
Use the
PaymentStream
Direct test environment for training purposes. Proceed as follows to log in to the Business Taxes test environment:
To log in to the Test Environment:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	Youâll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itâs your first login to the Client Centre, youâve deleted your cookies, or youâre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Test & Training Applications on the Client Centre
Select
PaymentStream
â¢ Direct (Prev-Comp) TEST
. This test environment mirrors the production environment. See Figure 3.
Note:	Alternatively, select
PaymentStream
â¢ Direct (SYS) TEST
. This test environment shows changes two weeks before the changes are deployed in production.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youâve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under âMy Favouritesâ.
Figure 3: Accessing PaymentStream Direct (Prev-Comp) TEST
Select
Payments
. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Selecting Payments to Access Business Taxes
See Section 8.2, Submitting Files and Tax Payments to CRA via Business Taxes, for procedures on entering transactions for remittance vouchers. Transactions entered in the test environment arenât forwarded to CRA.
7.3	Logging in to the Production Environment
Use the
PaymentStream
Direct production environment for submitting CRA files and payments to Central 1. Proceed as follows to log in to the Business Taxes production environment in
PaymentStream
Direct:
To log in to
PaymentStream
Direct:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 5.
Note: 	Youâll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itâs your first login to the Client Centre, youâve deleted your cookies, or youâre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 5: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 6.
Figure 6: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
PaymentStream Direct
. See Figure 7.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youâve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under âMy Favouritesâ.
Figure 7: Accessing PaymentStream Direct
Select
Payments
. See Figure 8.
Figure 8: Selecting Payments
See Section 8.2, Submitting Files and Tax Payments to CRA via Business Taxes, for procedures. Central 1 forwards transactions entered in the production environment to CRA.
END
